title: September 2017 Back Page – Would You Like to Serve on the AVEC Board?
summary: For the third time since the bylaws were amended, every AVEC member has a chance to vote on their choices to fill vacant seats on the AVEC board of directors. To start selecting candidates for those seats, the AVEC Board recently appointed a nominating committee of seven individuals who served as de...

title: Ahtna, Inc. Rejects Brenwick-Craig Road Settlement with State of Alaska
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE The Ahtna, Inc. Board of Directors votes not to enter into settlement Glennallen, Alaska – Ahtna, Incorporated (Ahtna, Inc.) announced today that they have rejected a proposed settlement with the State of Alaska regarding lands along Brenwick-Craig (Klutina Lake) Road and near the Historic Gulkana Village off the Richardson Highway.
